name: Tempted
description: If an allied unit is defeated by an enemy attack and the attacking unit is within 3 of a unit with the Tempted keyword, after the attack is resolved, that unit with the Tempted keyword may make a free Attack action or a Speed-2 Move ignoring diﬃcult terrain. A unit may use the Tempted keyword only once each Round.TRANSPORT During Setup, a unit with the Transport keyword may choose an allied m Trooper or n  Trooper unit to transport. During the first Round's Issue Orders step, a unit with the Transport keyword may issue an Order to the chosen unit. If the chosen unit is undeployed when the unit with the Transport keyword Deploys, after the effect is resolved, the unit with the Transport keyword Deploys by making a Speed-1 Move. Measure the start of this Move with both prongs of one side of the Movement Tool touching the base of the unit with the Transport keyword. A unit can make this Move regardless of its Speed. When the chosen unit Deploys in this way, the unit leader of that unit measures the vertical distance changed during that Move starting from the unit with the Transport keyword.
